task_completion.description: Verify that Stellarium is configured with the correct view settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Mars is centered in the view. The atmosphere and landscape are disabled (the background is black, no ground or sky is visible). The azimuthal grid (circular and radial lines) and labels are enabled and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the Madrid observation setup in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location window or bottom status bar shows the location as Madrid (or coordinates ~40.42° N, 4.25° W) and the date/time is set to 2021-02-18 20:30:00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Goldstone observation setup in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location window or bottom status bar shows the location as Goldstone (or coordinates ~35.42° N, 116.89° W) and the date/time is set to 2021-02-18 20:30:00.

task_completion.description: Verify that screenshots were captured and saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal shows image files inside the ~/Pictures/stellarium/ directory, or Stellarium displays an on-screen notification that a screenshot was saved to that path.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and content of the handoff report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named dsn_handoff_report.txt saved on the Desktop. The text includes the date (2021-02-18), the target (Mars), mentions both Madrid and Goldstone locations, and explicitly confirms that Mars is simultaneously visible from both.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Stellarium GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Stellarium graphical interface to set the location, time, and view options, rather than bypassing the GUI using scripts or config file edits.

integrity.description: Verify that the report was manually created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent types or constructs the report in a text editor, rather than using a script to generate it instantly without opening an editor.
The screenshots are generated by Stellarium's built-in screenshot function (often shown by an on-screen message) or by the system screenshot tool, not downloaded from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Mars. Date/Time: 2021-02-18 20:30:00 UTC. Madrid coordinates: 40.427° N, 4.250° W. Goldstone coordinates: 35.426° N, 116.890° W. View settings: Atmosphere OFF, Landscape OFF, Azimuthal Grid ON. Report path: ~/Desktop/dsn_handoff_report.txt. Screenshots directory: ~/Pictures/stellarium/.
